Brütal Doom hará que el viejo Doom tenga un aspecto nuevo y fresco. Te dará una razón para volver a jugar todos los niveles de Ultimate Doom, Doom 2 y Final Doom. Este mod también funciona con casi todos los megawads y paquetes de mapas que existen. ¡¡¡¡¡Respira y prepárate para RASGAR Y DESGARRAR ENORMES VIENTRAS!!!!!
Game.Title: Brutal Doom

Game.Notes: Unreal Tournament 3 marks the return of the world's premiere first-person shooter. Unreal Tournament 3 unleashes the full power of Unreal Engine 3, taking graphics, gameplay, and challenge to a whole new level. Players engage in intense battles with other human players online, or against Unreal artificial intelligence that sets the industry standard. With the most powerful futuristic weapons and vehicles available, this is FPS action at its best!
Game.Title: Unreal Tournament 3: Black Edition

Game.Notes: Embark on your greatest adventure to Planet Centauri! Explore hidden dungeons, capture and tame monsters, build and protect a NPC community, craft your own weapons and create your own magic spells! Develop and raise the Planet Centauri to the heavens as the cradle of a new civilization!
Game.Title: Planet Centauri

Game.Notes: ¡Infíltrate en posiciones terroristas, adquiere inteligencia crítica por cualquier medio necesario, ejecuta con extremo prejuicio y sal sin dejar rastro! Eres Sam Fisher, un agente secreto altamente capacitado del brazo secreto de la NSA: Third Echelon.
Game.Title: Tom Clancy's Splinter Cell

Game.Notes: Nunca antes el combate había sido tan rápido y directo.
Game.Title: Ace Combat: Assault Horizon Enhanced Edition

Game.Notes:
A galaxy-spanning adventure awaits in Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order, a new third-person action-adventure title from Respawn Entertainment. This narratively driven, single-player game puts you in the role of a Jedi Padawan who narrowly escaped the purge of Order 66 following the events of Episode 3: Revenge of the Sith. On a quest to rebuild the Jedi Order, you must pick up the pieces of your shattered past to complete your training, develop new powerful Force abilities and master the art of the iconic lightsaber - all while staying one step ahead of the Empire and its deadly Inquisitors.
While mastering your abilities, players will engage in cinematically charged lightsaber and Force combat designed to deliver the kind of intense Star Wars lightsaber battles as seen in the films. Players will need to approach enemies strategically, sizing up strengths and weaknesses while cleverly utilizing your Jedi training to overcome your opponents and solve the mysteries that lay in your path.
Star Wars fans will recognize iconic locations, weapons, gear and enemies while also meeting a roster of fresh characters, locations, creatures, droids and adversaries new to Star Wars. As part of this authentic Star Wars story, fans will delve into a galaxy recently seized by the Empire. As a Jedi hero-turned-fugitive, players will need to fight for survival while exploring the mysteries of a long-extinct civilization all in an effort to rebuild the remnants of the Jedi Order as the Empire seeks to erase the Jedi completely.
Game.Title: Star Wars Jedi: Fallen Order

Game.Notes: Worms™ Clan Wars is the biggest and best Worms™ game to date - more worms, larger landscapes, more dynamic water, more weapons and more customisation items than ever before.
Game.Title: Worms: Clan Wars

Game.Notes: Castlevania: Lords of Shadow – Ultimate Edition es la edición completa de Castlevania: Lords of Shadow, una nueva y oscura reimaginación de la mitología de Castlevania. Es el fin de los días y los poderes impíos aíslan la Tierra. La alianza del mundo con los cielos se ha visto amenazada por una fuerza oscura y malévola: los misteriosos Señores de las Sombras. A través de esta tierra destrozada, las almas de los muertos deambulan incapaces de encontrar la paz, mientras que las criaturas del mal siembran el caos y la muerte sobre los vivos. Gabriel Belmont es miembro de la Hermandad de la Luz, un grupo de élite de caballeros sagrados que protegen y defienden a los inocentes contra lo sobrenatural. Su amada esposa fue brutalmente asesinada por las fuerzas del mal de la oscuridad y su alma quedó atrapada para la eternidad. Ni viva ni muerta, se da cuenta de la horrible verdad de lo que está en juego y guía a Gabriel hacia su destino y, con suerte, la salvación del mundo.
Game.Title: Castlevania: Lords of Shadow: Ultimate Edition

Game.Notes:
Game overview Be greater. Be yourself.
Experience the rise of Miles Morales as the new hero masters incredible, explosive new powers to become his own Spider-Man.
In the latest adventure in the Marvel’s Spider-Man universe, teenager Miles Morales is adjusting to his new home while following in the footsteps of his mentor, Peter Parker, as a new Spider-Man.
But when a fierce power struggle threatens to destroy his new home, the aspiring hero realizes that with great power, there must also come great responsibility. To save all of Marvel’s New York, Miles must take up the mantle of Spider-Man and own it.
Game overview Be greater. Be yourself.
Experience the rise of Miles Morales as the new hero masters incredible, explosive new powers to become his own Spider-Man.
In the latest adventure in the Marvel’s Spider-Man universe, teenager Miles Morales is adjusting to his new home while following in the footsteps of his mentor, Peter Parker, as a new Spider-Man.
But when a fierce power struggle threatens to destroy his new home, the aspiring hero realizes that with great power, there must also come great responsibility. To save all of Marvel’s New York, Miles must take up the mantle of Spider-Man and own it.
Miles Morales discovers explosive powers that set him apart from his mentor, Peter Parker. Master his unique, bio-electric venom blast attacks and covert camouflage power alongside spectacular web-slinging acrobatics, gadgets and skills.
A war for control of Marvel’s New York has broken out between a devious energy corporation and a high-tech criminal army. With his new home at the heart of the battle, Miles must learn the cost of becoming a hero and decide what he must sacrifice for the greater good. Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales
Traverse the snowy streets of his new, vibrant and bustling neighborhood as Miles searches for a sense of belonging. When the lines blur between his personal and crime-fighting lives, he discovers who he can trust, and what it feels like to truly be home.
Game.Title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales

Game.ApplicationPath: D:\Naruto Shippuden Ultimate Ninja Storm Revolution\NSUNSR_launcher.exe
Game.Notes: THE REVOLUTIONARY STORM SERIES RETURNS! Live a new experience in the deep & rich NARUTO environment. Tons of new techniques, enhanced mechanics, over 100 playable characters & Support Ninjas, and a brand new exclusive character (Mecha-Naruto) designed by Masashi Kishimoto.
Game.RootFolder: D:\Naruto Shippuden Ultimate Ninja Storm Revolution
Game.Title: Naruto Shippuden: Ultimate Ninja Storm Revolution

Game.Notes: El Polo Norte, 1981... Alexander Nesterov es enviado a investigar el 'Viento del Norte', un rompehielos nuclear ahora atrapado en el Círculo Polar Ártico con su tripulación muerta congelada. Alexander debe luchar contra los horrores contenidos dentro del barco congelado y usar su misteriosa habilidad 'Mental Echo' para revelar los momentos finales de la tripulación muerta.
Game.Title: Cryostasis

Game.Notes:
Need for Speed: Underground is the seventh racing game in the Need for Speed video game series developed by EA Black Box and published by Electronic Arts in 2003.
Underground is a complete reboot for the series featuring a heavy emphasis on tuner culture and a storyline-driven career mode. All races take place in a generic city at night. Rather than exotic cars, Underground featured vehicles associated with the import scene.
Game.Title: Need for Speed: Underground

Game.Notes: Warhammer 40,000: Rites of War is a turn-based strategy game based on the celebrated Panzer General 2 engine by SSI. It is set in the fictional Warhammer 40,000 universe. It was produced by Games Workshop in 1999, and concerns the invasion of a Tyranid Hive fleet and the Eldar and Imperial efforts to defeat it.
Game.Title: Warhammer 40,000: Rites of War

Game.Notes: Enter the dark underworld of Prince of Persia Warrior Within, the sword-slashing sequel to the critically acclaimed Prince of Persia: The Sands of Time™. Hunted by Dahaka, an immortal incarnation of Fate seeking divine retribution, the Prince embarks upon a path of both carnage and mystery to defy his preordained death.
Game.Title: Prince of Persia: Warrior Within

Game.Notes: Con su combinación sin precedentes de autenticidad, historia convincente y acción basada en escuadrones, la franquicia Brothers in Arms se ha establecido como un punto de referencia para los juegos de acción militar, recibiendo las puntuaciones promedio más altas de cualquier juego de consola de la Segunda Guerra Mundial hasta la fecha (www.gamerankings.com ).
Game.Title: Brothers in Arms: Earned in Blood

Game.Notes:
Onimusha 3: Demon Siege, released in Japan and Europe as Onimusha 3 (鬼武者3 Onimusha Surī?), is an action-adventure game developed and published by Capcom. It is the third game of the Onimusha series and was released for the PlayStation 2 on April 27, 2004. It was later ported to Windows on December 8, 2005. The story focuses on the returning hero, swordsman Hidemitsu Samanosuke Akechi, who is in his quest to defeat his nemesis, Nobunaga Oda, who wishes to conquer Japan with his army of demons known as Genma. However, Samanosuke changes places with a French officer from the future named Jacques Blanc, and both have to adapt to their new worlds to get rid of Nobunaga and the Genma.
The game retains elements from previous games in the franchise including the use of multiple special weapons in order to fight enemies and absorb their energy to enhance the weaponry. This time the player primarily controls both Samanosuke and Jacques in separate scenarios. The two are able to exchange items in order to solve puzzles. The development from this game started after the release of the PlayStation 2 which allowed the team to work on a 3D engine to design 3D backgrounds. In order to appeal to the Western market, the team set this game in Paris and chose French actor Jean Reno to portray Jacques.
Onimusha 3 has been generally well received by publications for video games. Most of the writer's praise focused on the improved controls and the use of a 3D engine that allowed better combat and visuals, respectively. The game also generated good sales with over 1.5 million copies sold as of May 2008.
Game.Title: Onimusha 3: Demon Siege

Game.Notes:
Five years after the events depicted in Knights of the Old Republic, the Sith have become stronger and more determined to rule the Galaxy. The Jedi Order is nearly exterminated. A mysterious ex-Jedi has been exiled from the Order and is traveling alone. This Jedi had served under Darth Revan (when the latter was still on the Light side of the Force) during the Mandalorian Wars, but due to enigmatic circumstances was forced to retire. Now the past is catching up with the Jedi, and soon he or she will have to choose the side to fight on.
The Sith Lords looks and plays very similarly to its predecessor, also being based on the Star Wars d20 role-playing rule set (which, in its turn, is similar to the 3rd Edition of Dungeons & Dragons) and having the same combat engine, character development, and a Light and Dark ethical system, which judges the player's decisions and actions and influences story events and characters' responses. Additions to the gameplay include a lightsaber-crafting system, which allows augmenting lightsabers with various items, new Force powers, and the possibility to influence the alignments of the characters in the player-controlled party through conversation choices and other decisions. Most of the exploration and the combat sequences is done using a party of three, including the protagonist and two companions. However, certain parts of the game will force the player to travel alone, or to control a party made exclusively out of companions.
A large part of the military equipment can be upgraded using any workbench that can be found throughout the game world, including one available at all times on the ship that the player uses to travel between planetary systems. Different types of items have more than one piece that can be augmented. For example, the armor has two slots for upgrades (overlay and underlay), while ranged weapons have three (targeting, firing chamber, and power pack), and lightsabers have six. The easiest way to get additional upgrades is to either buy them or loot them, however they can be created as well at a workbench with the right components and enough repair skill. Medical items are a different sort and they can be crafted using lab stations.
At various moments during the game, the player has the opportunity to play some mini games: a card game called Pazaak, shooting targets using a turret from a first-person view, and swoop racing.
Game.Title: Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords

Game.Notes: su título se inspira en gran medida en las novedades introducidas en Guitar Hero: World Tour, con modos de carrera de banda para uno o varios jugadores con una historia dibujada como un dibujo animado, modos competitivos en línea y la posibilidad de tocar con diferentes instrumentos, como una guitarra normal. un bajo, batería y voz. La historia describe cómo una banda quiere seguir los pasos de Metallica y convertirse en el líder de su gira. Esta edición agrega un modo de dificultad Experto+ donde los jugadores deben tocar la batería usando un segundo pedal de bajo para imitar el estilo de interpretación de Lars Ulrich, el baterista de la banda. Los miembros también realizaron sesiones de captura de movimiento para los avatares del juego. La selección musical consta de 28 grabaciones maestras y 21 canciones adicionales de otros seleccionados por la banda. Las características adicionales incluyen varios videos y trivia sobre las canciones. El progreso se logra completando conjuntos de canciones, en lugar de una serie de conciertos como en Guitar Hero: World Tour, ambientados en lugares que fueron importantes en la carrera de la banda. Las actuaciones están calificadas con estrellas y se necesita una cierta cantidad para progresar y desbloquear un nuevo conjunto. El juego también incluye GHTunes de World Tour, donde se pueden crear y compartir nuevas canciones. Un nuevo Modo Batería ofrece la posibilidad de tocar la batería sin una pista de batería existente para crear nuevos ritmos, y el modo Batalla (de Guitar Hero III: Legends of Rock), se ha actualizado con influencias de Metallica para los potenciadores, con nombres. como Fade To Black, Under The Ice y Ride The Lightning.
Game.Title: Guitar Hero: Metallica

Game.Notes: Dive into an adrenaline-fuelled free-roaming adventure with 400 square miles of rugged terrain and hundreds of weapons and vehicles.
Game.Title: Just Cause 2

Game.Notes: In 2291, consensual murder is legalized, opening the way for a previously underground event. Smaller mining companies have been running smaller matches to channel aggression, but now the Liandri Mining Corporation established a professional league, which quickly proves to be an extremely lucrative way of public entertainment. Liandri entered into the Tournament, as it is officially called, sponsoring their own team, the Corrupt. The Corrupt's leader, Xan Kriegor, quickly achieved champion status and held it for two years. In 2293, a human named Malcolm dethroned him and became champion himself. A huge media figure, Malcolm is hailed as the biggest star in human history and is worshipped as a god. His success nets great rewards for his sponsoring corporation, attracting the attention of jealous rivals both in the arenas of the Tournament and in the corridors of power a galaxy away. Liandri attempted to win back the champion title with Xan MK2 but failed (unknown to the other contestants, each member of the Corrupt is purely robotic, including Xan). Now it is 2302. The Tournament is undergoing a massive overhaul. The aging Sniper Rifle (a relic of centuries past) is removed from the Tournament as is "Assault" - a team-based event that forms a part of the competition. Many fans of the Tournament complain at these changes, with some combatants refusing to participate in the new format. Malcolm, shortly after his victory, hired two of his former opponents (Brock and Lauren, members of the former Iron Guard team) as teammates in his reformed Thunder Crash team. But the Axon Research Corporation, another of the four great corporations, entered the Tournament as well, sponsoring the geneboosted Juggernaut team, led by the brutal and savage Gorge.
Game.Title: Unreal Tournament 2003

Game.Notes: The Prince of Persia, a seasoned warrior, returns from the Island of Time to Babylon with his love, Kaileena. Instead of the peace that he longs for, he finds his homeland ravaged by war and the kingdom turned against him.
Game.Title: Prince of Persia: The Two Thrones

Game.Notes: Resident Evil 0 reveals the truth behind the Mansion Incident, the catalyst for the entire storyline of the Resident Evil series. This remastered version takes the story and gameplay of the original and adds stunning HD graphics, 5.1 channel surround sound, optional modernised controls and widescreen TV compatibility. Get ready to discover the terrible secrets lurking in the origins of evil.
Game.Title: Resident Evil Zero: HD Remaster

Game.Notes:
Cuando la esposa del exitoso escritor Alan Wake desaparece durante sus vacaciones, su búsqueda descubre páginas de un thriller que ni siquiera recuerda haber escrito. Una Presencia Oscura acecha el pequeño pueblo de Bright Falls, empujando a Wake al borde de la cordura en su lucha por desentrañar el misterio y salvar a su amor.
Presentado al estilo de una serie de televisión, Alan Wake presenta la narración característica de Remedy y secuencias de acción trepidantes. A medida que los jugadores se sumergen cada vez más en el misterio, se enfrentarán a probabilidades abrumadoras, giros en la trama y momentos de suspenso. Sólo dominando la mecánica de combate Fight With Light podrán estar un paso por delante de la oscuridad que se extiende por Bright Falls.
Con el cuerpo de un juego de acción y la mente de un thriller psicológico, la intensa atmósfera de Alan Wake, su historia profunda y de múltiples capas y sus secuencias de combate excepcionalmente tensas brindan a los jugadores una experiencia de juego entretenida y original.
Game.Title: Alan Wake

Game.Notes:
Aliens Versus Predator 2: Primal Hunt narra la brecha inicial que condujo a los eventos en Aliens Versus Predator 2, específicamente, la destrucción del Research Pod 5. La historia se desarrolla a lo largo de nueve misiones en total, con tres por especie (Predator, Predalien y Corporativo). Cada uno de los tres personajes jugables busca recuperar un misterioso artefacto con el poder de confundir y repeler a los alienígenas.
Las nuevas características del juego incluyen la capacidad de jugar como un híbrido Predator-Alien más duro en modo individual y multijugador, una nueva arma de "flechettas de energía" para el Predator y un nuevo rastreador de movimiento de 360 grados y pistolas centinela desplegables para los humanos. El modo multijugador incluye cuatro nuevos mapas Deathmatch y la capacidad del Predator de activar una bomba de autodestrucción de corto alcance cuando esté a punto de ser derrotado.
Se requiere una copia del Aliens Versus Predator 2 original para jugar Aliens Versus Predator 2: Primal Hunt.
Game.Title: Aliens Versus Predator 2: Primal Hunt

Game.Notes: GTA se une a South Park con sexo y drogas en BoneTown, un juego hilarantemente duro que combina la itinerancia libre, un juego de acción y aventuras con follar, pelear y ser jodido.
Game.Title: BoneTown: The Second Coming Edition

Game.Notes:
Help Tomb Raider's famous heroine, Lara Croft, save the world from the forces of evil.
As the game begins, Lara wakes from a stupor. Recalling what she can of the past few hours, she remembers walking in on a killer after discovering the body of Von Croy, her friend and former mentor. She must make a hasty escape from the authorities who blame her for the crime. Determined to discover the fiend responsible, Lara eventually uncovers an evil plot that could cause the destruction of mankind. If the reincarnation of the "angel of darkness" is allowed to happen, the world is doomed!
The game environment is set in the somewhat distant future. You'll lead Lara mostly in 3rd person perspective, travelling to various locales in Europe. Explore sewers, cemeteries, warehouses, factories and cities. A multitude of NPCs will be encountered, both in the form of friend as well as foe.
Angel of Darkness introduces new stealth and close-combat moves - ducking, sneaking and hug-the-walls walking. Lara must build her skills by performing action sequences. You'll have her running, dodging, performing flying leaps and platform jumps, shimming along walls and cables, as well as moving boxes and other obstacles around. Advancements are achieved with strategically placed power-ups. Collect weapons and ammunition, artifacts and money.
You'll also play Kurtis Trent, a new male counterpart, for several "levels". Although Kurtis gets in Lara's way when she first meets him, he eventually becomes an ally when they realize they are both working towards the same goal.
Game.Title: Tomb Raider: The Angel of Darkness

Game.Notes: Explora la ciudad de Los Perdidos, infestada de zombis, y encuentra una manera de escapar antes de que un ataque militar borre del mapa a toda la ciudad y a todos sus habitantes.
Game.Title: Dead Rising 3

Game.Notes:
Hack-and-slashers tread carefully through the lands of Sacred, where the world itself is threatened by a veritable host of demons, set loose by a powerful but misguided sorcerer. A combat-driven adventure in the basic style of the popular Diablo games, Sacred offers a number of enhancements and unusual features that are new to the realm of action-RPGs. Players choose from six distinct character types, all with significantly different abilities as well as their own storylines and starting locations. These heroes can learn to ride horses and string together power combination attacks, and some may behave very differently as the game world cycles from day to night.
Playable characters include the burly gladiator, the agile wood elf, and the sneaky dark elf, as well as the angelic seraphim, the versatile battlemage, and the vampire, who appears as a noble knight during the day but commands the powers of her undead legacy at night. The world of Sacred is designed to encourage open exploration and freestyle progression, as the majority of the game's areas are accessible to player characters from the start. Each town in the game world is designed to have its own personality and player missions; characters who manage to accomplish all of a town's missions become true heroes there. Graphics feature 3D-rendered characters against hand-painted backgrounds, with three zoom levels.
Game.Title: Sacred Gold Edition

Game.Notes: Acepta una destrucción inigualable en Battlefield 4™. Disfrute del glorioso caos de la guerra total repleta de desafíos tácticos gratificantes en un entorno interactivo.
Game.Title: Battlefield 4

Game.Notes: Elige tu destino en Assassin's Creed® Odyssey. De marginado a leyenda viviente, embárcate en una odisea para descubrir los secretos de tu pasado y cambiar el destino de la antigua Grecia.
Game.Title: Assassin's Creed: Odyssey
Game.Genre: Action; Adventure; Role-Playing; Sandbox; Stealth; Vehicle Simulation

Game.Notes:
Transformers: War for Cybertron challenges players to become the ultimate weapon as a Transformers character in the final, epic war that will determine the survival of their entire race. Armed with a diverse arsenal of lethal, high-tech weaponry and the ability to instantly convert from robot to vehicle at any time, players will engage in heart-pounding battles on land and in the air in this gripping, 3rd person action shooter set in the Transformers' war-ravaged homeland.
Complete with several multiplayer modes, Transformers: War for Cybertron allows gamers to play through story missions with their friends in drop in/drop out online co-op, and also create their own Transformers character for competitive head-to-head multiplayer modes, choosing among four distinct character classes, personalizing its look and selecting from a huge variety of weapons, skills and abilities.
Game.Title: Transformers: War for Cybertron

Game.Notes: In Warhammer 40,000 Space Marine you are Captain Titus, a Space Marine of the Ultramarines chapter and a seasoned veteran of countless battles.
Game.Title: Warhammer 40,000: Space Marine

Game.Notes: Conviértete en un vikingo legendario en busca de la gloria. Ataca a tus enemigos, haz crecer tu asentamiento y construye tu poder político.
Game.Title: Assassin's Creed: Valhalla

Game.Notes: Need for Speed™ (NFS) is back and better than ever in Need For Speed™ Hot Pursuit 2! Engage in the next generation thrill of arcade racing with the successor to Need for Speed™ III Hot Pursuit. Realistic, detailed environments bring to life elements from the real world – rain, brush fires, sun beams, dust storms and more. Play a variety of modes including Challenge, Hot Pursuit, Championship, Top Cop and "Be The Cop" mode. Over 60 unique events give racers the opportunity to unlock bonus items including new cars and tracks. Maneuvering exotic super cars through traffic and police at upwards of 200 mph puts you on the edge of your seat. Open world environments and shortcuts allow for intense off-road excitement. Over 20 of the most coveted licensed exotics including the Lamborghini Murcielago and Ferrari 360 Spider. Includes 2-player split screen multiplayer support (PC version allows for up to eight-players via LAN and Internet support)
Game.Title: Need for Speed: Hot Pursuit 2

Game.Notes: The game begins where a former street racer known as Ryan Cooper enters a challenge day and wins it with a Nissan 240SX. Ryan is mocked by Ryo Watanabe, the Showdown King.
Game.Title: Need for Speed: ProStreet

Game.Notes: Call of Duty®: Black Ops III Zombies Chronicles Edition incluye el juego base completo más la expansión de contenido Zombies Chronicles.
Game.Title: Call of Duty: Black Ops III

Game.Notes: XCOM: Chimera Squad delivers an all-new story and turn-based tactical combat experience in the XCOM universe.
Game.Title: XCOM: Chimera Squad

Game.Notes:
Antes de que Estados Unidos lanzara la bomba sobre Japón, un escuadrón de comandos se infiltró en una isla en el Mar de Japón para exfiltrar a un científico japonés. Estaba trabajando en un arma secreta cuyo nombre en código era Aurora. Pero antes de que los comandos pudieran escapar de la isla, Japón activó a Aurora y mató a todos.
Battlefield: Bad Company 2 tiene lugar en la actualidad después de los eventos de Battlefield: Bad Company. Los cuatro miembros de B-Company, más conocidos como Bad Company, los soldados Preston Marlowe, Terrence Sweetwater, George Haggard y el sargento Samuel Redford son enviados detrás de las líneas enemigas rusas para asegurar un dispositivo relacionado con Aurora. Pero aunque lograron escapar de los soldados rusos y completaron su misión supuestamente final, el dispositivo resulta ser falso. En consecuencia, el general del ejército Braidwood los asigna a una operación especial para detener Aurora.
La campaña para un jugador bastante lineal pone al jugador en la piel del soldado Preston Marlowe, enviándolo a descubrir los misterios que rodean a Aurora en un típico estilo de disparos en primera persona. Del lado de los otros miembros de Bad Company, el jugador intenta cumplir los diversos objetivos de las misiones mientras dispara a varias docenas de enemigos usando un enorme arsenal de equipo militar del mundo real, pero limitado a llevar solo dos armas principales y un arma lateral. brazo al mismo tiempo. Durante el transcurso del juego, el jugador desbloquea nuevas armas al encontrarlas durante sus misiones, lo que le otorga la posibilidad de equiparlas a partir de ese momento en cada entrega de suministros.
Como en entregas anteriores de la serie Battlefield, el núcleo del juego vuelve a ser el modo multijugador basado en clases y en equipos para hasta 32 jugadores, divididos en escuadrones de cuatro hombres cada uno. Hay cuatro modos de juego disponibles: Rush, Conquest, Squad-Rush y Squad-Deathmatch. Cada modo también se puede jugar en dificultad "Hardcore", desactivando la mira, el minimapa y demás. Los cuatro modos en detalle:
- Rush requiere que los dos equipos, rusos y estadounidenses, defiendan o destruyan los transmisores móviles. Una vez que el equipo atacante destruye uno con éxito, el campo de batalla se expande y la lucha pasa al siguiente transmisor. - La conquista se trata una vez más de capturar y sostener banderas. - Squad-Rush tiene dos escuadrones que luchan por dos transmisores móviles al mismo tiempo. - Squad-Deathmatch enfrenta a los escuadrones entre sí y el ganador es el escuadrón que logra la mayor cantidad de muertes.
Las clases disponibles son Asalto, Ingeniero, Médico y Reconocimiento. Cada clase tiene su propio conjunto de armas y dispositivos. Mientras el ingeniero tiene su linterna de reparación para reparar tanques y otra maquinaria, el médico usa su desfibrilador para revivir a los miembros caídos del equipo y evitar la pérdida de un ticket. Cada clase obtiene acceso a nuevas armas y equipos al subir de nivel. Los jugadores obtienen puntos de experiencia por matar gente, capturar banderas, cumplir objetivos y obtener logros como matar a 7 enemigos en una ronda con una ametralladora ligera. Se obtienen puntos adicionales si el jugador interactúa con uno de sus compañeros de equipo actuales. Con estos puntos de experiencia, el jugador sube de nivel tanto su clase para desbloquear cosas nuevas como su rango general.
Aunque el juego tiene mucha infantería, vehículos como bicicletas, tanques o helicópteros están listos para ser utilizados en la lucha. Los tanques son especialmente útiles para aprovechar al máximo el llamado sistema Destruction 2.0, que permite a los jugadores derribar edificios enteros si se utiliza suficiente potencia de fuego. El sistema de salud es una combinación de uso de paquetes médicos y curación automática. Si un jugador aún muere y un Medic no lo resucita, puede optar por reaparecer en puntos estacionarios como la base de operaciones o las banderas capturadas, o usar a uno de sus compañeros de escuadrón como punto de entrada.
Game.Title: Battlefield: Bad Company 2

Game.Notes: Jelly Brawl: Classic is a FREE sticky and destructive multiplayer party game where you gotta jiggle, flop, and pop your way to the top! Fight alone or against friends for freedom from a mad king across tons of stages, mini games, and modes as you wrestle to be the last jelly standing!
Game.Title: Jelly Brawl: Classic
Game.Genre: Action; Casual; Free to Play; Indie

Game.Notes:
A few days after the events described in Tomb Raider: The Last Revelation, Lara Croft is presumed dead. Her close friends begin to recollect her previous adventures, which occurred during different periods of her life. These include searching for the Philosopher's Stone in Rome; preventing the Spear of Destiny from falling into the hands of a ruthless gang leader; facing monsters on the Black Isle of Ireland as a child; and, finally, infiltrating a high-tech complex in pursuit of the Iris artefact.
Like its predecessors, Tomb Raider: Chronicles is an action game with puzzle-solving and platforming elements. The gameplay is very similar to that of the previous games, with the addition of a few new skills. Lara can now walk on tightropes, swing on horizontal bars, and somersault forwards from a ledge while crouching. A grappling hook has been added to her inventory. The game also includes a level editor, allowing the player to create new stages for Lara to explore.
Game.Title: Tomb Raider: Chronicles

Game.Notes: Enjoy a 4vs1 asymmetric horror experience like no other. Be a part of the investigator team, or take control of the creature and devour them!
Game.Title: White Noise 2

Game.Notes: Command your TOY SOLDIERS in epic, action-packed battles.
Game.Title: Toy Soldiers

Game.Notes: Call of Duty® regresa a sus raíces con Call of Duty®: WWII, una experiencia impresionante que redefine la Segunda Guerra Mundial para una nueva generación de juegos.
Game.Title: Call of Duty: WWII

Game.Notes: EVERSPACE™ combina combates trepidantes con elementos roguelike, excelentes imágenes y una historia cautivadora. Te lleva en un viaje desafiante a través de un universo en constante cambio, bellamente diseñado y lleno de sorpresas. Dispara, crea y saquea para llegar a la victoria mientras las probabilidades están en tu contra.
Game.Title: EVERSPACE
Game.Genre: Action; Adventure; Flight Simulator; Shooter; Vehicle Simulation

Game.Notes: Una oscura amenaza consume el Viejo Oeste. En solitario o en cooperativo, lucha con estilo en un combate visceral y explosivo contra monstruosidades sedientas de sangre. Erradica las hordas vampíricas con tu guantelete impulsado por rayos y conviértete en un superhéroe del Lejano Oeste.
Game.Title: Evil West

Game.Notes:
Change Your Blade, Change Your Destiny. Ultra Age is a high-speed, sword-swinging action game set in the far future that follows the story of young warrior Age, who embarks on a mission to save humankind from extinction. Use your blades to cut through robotic and mutant foes, explore futuristic locales, and unravel a vast conspiracy concerning the fate of the planet. Far in the future, the resources of Earth have become insufficient, its ecosystem long ago changed irrevocably by a passing meteor. Humankind has divided into two: the people who have escaped Earth and relocated to the space colony, 'Orbital Arc,' and the others who have remained on Earth in a facility called ‘The Shelter.’
Humanity vanished from Earth after civilians from The Shelter failed an experiment that was meant to be the last hope for humanity, while people from Orbital Arc sent expeditions to Earth in search of resources. Failing to find any signs of life, a young sword-wielding warrior named ‘Age’ falls down from orbit to Earth. Accompanied by his floating android, Helvis, he must find the indispensable key to the survival of humankind.
Game.Title: Ultra Age

Game.Notes:
¡Este primer paquete DLC para Cloudbuilt agrega una nueva área temática al mundo (Fog) e introduce cinco niveles únicos que realmente pondrán a prueba tus habilidades! Estas nuevas etapas no sólo son divertidas para los jugadores experimentados, sino que también brindan a los nuevos jugadores la oportunidad de experimentar el aspecto de plataformas del juego por sí solo antes de enfrentarse a los enemigos. Con la niebla acercándose y tu visibilidad nublada, ¿tienes lo necesario para llegar a la salida?
Tenga en cuenta: para desbloquear el área de niebla, los jugadores deben haber completado primero la etapa del tutorial "Entrada inicial".
Game.Title: Cloudbuilt: Through the Fog

Game.Notes: El galardonado desarrollador Gray Matter Interactive continúa el éxito de Call of Duty™ de Infinity Ward, ganador de más de 80 premios Juego del año y 50 premios Editors' Choice en todo el mundo, con Call of Duty™: United Offensive™. Asuma el papel de soldados estadounidenses, británicos y rusos en algunas de las batallas más culminantes de la Segunda Guerra Mundial, incluida la Batalla de las Ardenas, la invasión de Sicilia y la Batalla de Kursk. Lucha en tanques, jeeps, motocicletas e incluso en un bombardero. Trabaja con tu escuadrón bajo la nieve y la lluvia, usando nuevas armas, incluidos lanzallamas y ametralladoras desplegables, o solicitando ataques de artillería. 13 misiones totalmente nuevas para un jugador que abarcan tres campañas. 11 nuevos y emocionantes mapas multijugador y 3 nuevos modos multijugador que incluyen Dominación, Capturar la bandera y Asalto a la base.
Game.Title: Call of Duty: United Offensive

Game.Notes:
Medieval: Total War - Viking Invasion is the official expansion pack to Medieval: Total War. It is set during the age of Vikings, in 793 AD to be more precise, and they come to Europe to wreak havoc.
New features in this expansion are:
- Viking campaigns and new factions - New units: Viking Berserkers, Saxon Huscarles, Frydmen - New weapons - Historical heroes: Harold Godwinson, Edward the Confessor, and Leif Erikson
Game.Title: Medieval: Total War: Viking Invasion

Game.Notes:
Todo comienza en Liberty City. Con la libertad de ir a cualquier parte y secuestrar a cualquiera, el despiadado mundo del crimen está a tu alcance, si tienes las agallas suficientes para aceptarlo.
Juega al clásico que define el género actualizado para una nueva generación, ahora con mejoras generales que incluyen nueva iluminación brillante y mejoras ambientales, con texturas de alta resolución, mayores distancias de dibujo, controles y objetivos estilo Grand Theft Auto V, y mucho más. más, dando vida a este amado mundo con nuevos niveles de detalle.
Game.Title: Grand Theft Auto III: The Definitive Edition
Game.Genre: Action; Adventure; Sandbox; Shooter; Vehicle Simulation

Game.Notes:
Operation Flashpoint: Resistance (also known as ARMA: Resistance) is an expansion pack to Operation Flashpoint: Cold War Crisis. It was developed by Bohemia Interactive, authors of the original game, and published by Codemasters. It is the second expansion of Operation Flashpoint, the first one being Operation Flashpoint: Red Hammer, which was developed by Codemasters. Resistance was later re-released as part of ArmA: Cold War Assault.
The expansion adds a new campaign, which takes place on the fictional island of Nogova. The island's towns and villages are mostly named after real locations in the Czech Republic. The plot is inspired by the Warsaw Pact invasion of Czechoslovakia.[1]
The storyline takes place in 1982, three years before the events of Operation Flashpoint: Cold War Crisis. The player takes on the role of an ex-special operations soldier, Victor Troska, who must fight the Soviet Army, which has invaded his country.
Game.Title: Operation Flashpoint: Resistance

Game.Notes: Shadow Blade is an action-platformer set in a visually striking world where the ancient teachings of ninjas and samurai clash upon a modern landscape. Sprint through stages littered with traps, slaying enemies along your path without hesitation as Kuro, the blade of shadow!
Game.Title: Shadow Blade: Reload

Game.Notes: Play with life and discover the possibilities. Unleash your imagination and create a world of Sims that’s wholly unique. Explore and customize every detail from Sims to homes–and much more.
Game.Title: The Sims 4
Game.Genre: Construction and Management Simulation; Life Simulation; Role-Playing; Sandbox; Strategy

Game.Notes: Winner of over 175 Game of the Year Awards and recipient of over 250 perfect scores, RDR2 is the epic tale of outlaw Arthur Morgan and the infamous Van der Linde gang, on the run across America at the dawn of the modern age. Also includes access to the shared living world of Red Dead Online.
Game.Title: Red Dead Redemption II

Game.Notes: The sequel to Mechwarrior 4: Vengeance. When you're a 'Mech Mercenary, you call the shots. You don't fight for honor - you fight for cold hard cash, a fierce reputation, and the heart-pounding thrill of the kill. Your allegiance goes to the highest bidder. You answer only to the call of fortune. Your fate is in your hands alone. Select from 4 of the most notorious mercenary units, Kell Hounds, Wolf's Dragoons, Northwind Highlanders, and Gray Death Legion, to alter your missions, with different outcomes based on your victories. Choose from over 35 different 'Mechs, including 10 new ones. And for the first time ever, your secondary lance allows you to muster 8 'Mechs into battle simultaneously. Or make a killing in the infamous Solaris VII arenas, where fighting dirty can make you filthy rich. Includes 'Mechs from the Black Knight expansion for Mechwarrior 4, and is fully compatible with Mechwarrior 4 'Mech Packs. Fight for fame. Fight for fortune. Fight as a Mech Mercenary!
Game.Title: MechWarrior 4: Mercenaries

Game.Notes: In The Settlers — Rise of an Empire, players build lively, bustling towns in a medieval world. Everything in this richly detailed, realistic world is visible and lovingly animated. Each Settler figure has his or her own daily routine, with a range of different actions and behaviors that can be observed at all times. The ultimate objective of the game is to expand your empire and become a legendary ruler. Spur your settlers on to ever greater efforts, develop a flourishing economy, satisfy the needs of your citizens, and protect your people from danger!
Game.Title: The Settlers: Rise of an Empire

Game.Notes: Juega al juego de acción en línea número uno del mundo. Participa en una guerra terrorista increíblemente realista en este popular juego por equipos. Alíate con compañeros de equipo para completar misiones estratégicas. Elimina los sitios enemigos. Rescatar a los rehenes. Su rol afecta el éxito de su equipo. El éxito de su equipo afecta su rol.
Game.Title: Half-Life: Counter-Strike

Game.Notes:
The Eastern Realm begins several months after the Red Prince's defeat, with Elias, Hakim, and Marcus (who has been forgiven for his betrayal), alerting the king that the southern kingdom of Basa has lost contact with the neighbouring kingdom of Hidun. In response, the king sends the trio to Basrima, a province on the border of Basa and Hidun. After riding the area of bandits intercepting communications between the two kingdoms, the party are led to the bandits' camp by a local woman. There, they find that the bandits were in the service of the "Goddess of the Green Fire". The woman then introduces herself as Saraya, daughter of Praphat, Mogul of Hidun. She joins the party, telling them that after losing contact with Basa, Praphat set out to investigate. However, contact with his expedition was also lost, and Saraya was searching for him when she was attacked by an army led by "strange priests."
The party travel to the province of Hendalla in Hidun, where they learn that priests recently told the settlers Hidun was cursed, and only Khana, the priests' leader, could save them. Praphet soon arrives, telling the party he has sent a spy into Khana's camp, before heading for Thela, Hidun's capital. Meanwhile, the spy sends word that Khana is in Amesthan. Accompanied by a battalion of Praphat's troops, the party are ambushed as soon as they arrive, having been led into a trap. Holding off Khana's troops, they are shocked when Praphet's battalion also attacks them. They repel the attack, but cannot understand how Khana could have persuaded the troops to join her.[68] They soon learn that the battalion attacked on the orders of Praphat himself.[69] Marcus then brings word that Khana has attacked Thela, which is badly damaged, but unconquered. Subsequently, Praphat has his men abduct Saraya, telling her, "I have come to rescue you from the invaders. Khana will protect us both."
Learning that Saraya is to be publicly sacrificed, the party travel to Almerabad, where she is being held. There, they are met by Namawili, a disciple of the real Khana. They free Saraya, who tells them that Khana has sent Praphat to Praphatstan to raise an army to finish off Thela. Namawili says Thela can be fortified before the army attacks, but only if the party are able to locate the treasure of Dario, hidden in the mountains of Idukun.[61][70] They retrieve the treasure, which they transport to Thela, before heading to Praphatstan. Although they are no match for the city's defences, they cut off the military buildings from their iron sources. Telling the party that the army in Praphatstan was only part of the plan, and another legion is stationed elsewhere, Praphat flees. The party next travel to Nakhara, Khana's home province. As she gloats that she has already dispatched Praphat to destroy Thela, the party storm the city, and arrest her. They also learn that Khana secured Praphat's loyalty by giving him a draught that eroded his will.
In Thela, as the party set about securing the support of the local villages, Namawili arrives with the recipe for an antidote to Khana's draught. Procuring the necessary ingredients, Namawili brews the antidote. When Praphat leads a series of raiding parties against the local villages, the party capture him, and administer it. Shortly thereafter, he regains his senses, telling Saraya that he dreamt of a witch in green. With the war over and Hidun secure, Praphat thanks the party, and tells the king that he will always have an ally in Hidun.
Game.Title: The Settlers 6: The Eastern Realm

Game.Notes: Wolfenstein ™ brings the Nazis dark obsession with the occult to life with epic action and harrowing shooter combat. Use a powerful arsenal of both definitive and occult-enhanced Axis and Allied weapons to beat back a supernatural Nazi force that is full of surprises. Play as BJ Blazkowicz, a highly decorated member of the Office of Secret Actions (OSA). You are sent on a special mission into the heart of the Reich to investigate evidence that the Nazis may possess a new and mysterious power. While behind enemy lines, you discover the Nazis have done much more than develop a new toy. The Nazis are harnessing the power of the Black Sun through a dark parallel dimension called The Veil; in order to create a weapon of war-ending mass destruction. You are the only one that can stop them and save the world from their perverse domination. • Amazing enemies: You never know what ferocious enemies the Nazis will throw at you next as they bring their dark fantasies to life. Intense combat moments: Experience movie-like epic action sequences as you fight to prevent the Nazis from unleashing the power of the Black Sun, a war-ending supernatural weapon capable of unlimited destruction. • Unique environments: Explore the mysteries of The Veil, a world between our reality and the occult underworld that offers you combat advantages but also presents new supernatural threats. • Impressive firepower: Go into battle with a diverse collection of Allied, Axis, and experimental Nazi weapons. Earn gold by working with the resistance fighters, purchase upgrades in the black market, and customize your personal arsenal. • Classic RTCW multiplayer with an occult twist: Revisit the heart-pounding, award-winning class and objective-based multiplayer of Return to Castle Wolfenstein, now with occult-enhanced firepower and online statistics tracking.
Game.Title: Wolfenstein

Game.Notes: 370 BC. The City of Rome and its royal families has united Italy. It is time for them to turn their eyes outward. You will be leading one of the Royal Families of Rome (Julii, Scpii, Brutii). The Julii are in control of Northern Italy and they are very close to the borders of Gaul lands and the remainder of Europe. The Scipii are in Control of Southern Italy and Sicily. They are facing the Carthaginian people, who are one of the prime powers in Mediterranean. And the last family, the Brutii hold the eastern part of Italy. They have already set their eyes to Greece and Macedonia, most advanced civilizations of the ancient era. You will be choosing your faction who, you will try to carry to the victory over his enemies, and eventually his allies and the Rome. But keep in mind, the Senate is always watchful for ambitious leaders.
Game.Title: Rome: Total War

Game.Notes: Get ready for an epic journey to defend your kingdom against hordes of orcs, trolls, evil wizards and other nasty fiends using a vast arsenal of towers and spells at your command!Fight on forests, mountains and wastelands, customizing your defensive strategy with different tower upgrades and specializations!
Game.Title: Kingdom Rush

Game.Notes: Warhammer Quest 2: The End Times is the sequel to a turn based strategy classic, Warhammer Quest. It’s stunning visuals and deep tactical gameplay are an addictive mix that is a feast for the senses.
Game.Title: Warhammer Quest II: The End Times

Game.Notes:
According to Egyptian legend, Horus outwitted the evil god Set and imprisoned him in a secret tomb...
Five thousand years later, Lara Croft discovers the lost tomb and unwittingly unleashes the Set, fulfilling the ancient prophecy of his return to plunge mankind into darkness! In a race against time, Lara must use all of her wit and skill to reimprison Set and save the world from Armageddon. Pursued at every turn by her arch-rival, the unscrupulous archaeologist Werner Von Croy, Lara embarks on a journey of discovery across Egypt, where she must overcome the most ingenious puzzles and infernal traps ever devised, and face terrifying evil from beyond the grave...
Tomb Raider: The Last Revelation plays very similar to the previous games in the series, but some new things have been added to the game. The biggest addition is that now rather large parts of the game consist of several interconnected levels sometimes explored in any order, with puzzles in one level often requiring that some actions are done in other levels. The new additions to Lara's arsenal are a revolver and a bow with several sets of arrows including exploding and poisonous ones. The players will also find a laser sight which can be attached to any of the two weapons described above allowing manual targeting and zooming. Inventory now holds a binocular with built-in flashlight and a handy crowbar (found later in the game). Lara has also learned a few new moves: she can climb into the niches with low ceiling if the crouch button is pressed, she can now move around the corners while hanging and she can also pull levers and open trap-doors while jumping.
Graphics have been upgraded too - there are new light effects and water is now dripping from Lara's clothes when she gets on surface.
Game.Title: Tomb Raider: The Last Revelation

Game.Notes:
¡El clásico RPG FINAL FANTASY VII regresa a PC, ahora con nuevas funciones en línea!
En Midgar, una ciudad controlada por el megaconglomerado Shinra Inc., el reactor número uno Mako ha sido volado por un grupo rebelde, AVALANCHE.
AVALANCHE se formó en secreto para librar una rebelión contra Shinra Inc., una organización que está absorbiendo la energía Mako, destruyendo los recursos naturales del planeta. Cloud, un ex miembro de la fuerza de combate de élite de Shinra, SOLDADO, estuvo involucrado en el bombardeo del reactor Mako.
¿Podrán Cloud y AVALANCHE proteger el planeta del enorme y formidable enemigo Shinra Inc.?
Game.Title: Final Fantasy VII

Game.Notes: Max Payne is a man with nothing to lose in the violent, cold urban night. A fugitive undercover cop framed for murder, hunted by cops and the mob, Max is a man with his back against the wall, fighting a battle he cannot hope to win. Prepare for pain…
Game.Title: Max Payne

Game.Notes: WWF Raw is a wrestling game based on the television show of the game name, the flagship program of the World Wrestling Federation. The player can control any of the forty-five WWF superstars, including The Rock, Stone Cold Steve Austin, The Undertaker, Triple H, and others. The game features a tag team mode, in which four wrestlers can compete with each other. Also included is a superstar mode, which allows the player to create and customize an own wrestler, taking him through a series of matches on the way to the WWF crown. Many of the game's presentation details imitate those seen in the original show, such as introduction sequences for each wrestler, "double replay" feature, the ability to assault opponents and interfere with them on their way to the ring, etc.
Game.Title: WWE Raw

Game.Notes:
Aliens Versus Predator es un juego de disparos en primera persona de ciencia ficción basado en las dos franquicias cinematográficas asociadas. El juego tiene tres especies jugables y cada una tiene su propia campaña para un jugador con diferentes misiones y tramas.
- Extraterrestres... Sus únicas armas son las partes de su propio cuerpo: garras para el combate cuerpo a cuerpo, su cola mortal y su boca interior que puede atravesar el cráneo de un enemigo (para matarlo instantáneamente) si está lo suficientemente cerca. Son mortales a corta distancia y pueden curarse comiendo cadáveres o cabezas de enemigos desprevenidos. No pueden lastimarse por caídas y un modo de visión alternativo les permite ver claramente hacia adelante en la oscuridad. Su punto fuerte reside en la flexibilidad y la velocidad, y en la capacidad de aferrarse a las paredes y correr por cualquier superficie, lo que permite a un jugador experto escapar o tender emboscadas literalmente desde cualquier dirección 3D.
- Humanos... Marines estadounidenses, interpretados por Michael Biehn en la película 'Aliens'. Los marines tienen una gran potencia de fuego que va desde el SmartGun de seguimiento automático hasta lanzacohetes y miniguns de seis cañones (como se ve en 'Predator'). Los marines son la especie más familiar para jugar, con el estilo de juego del héroe típico de FPS. Sin embargo, su fragilidad a corta distancia y las misiones que los dejan varados, solos, rodeados de extraterrestres sedientos de sangre, hacen que su experiencia se acerque más al survival horror.
- Depredadores... Su poder es su fuerza y su vista. Tienen al menos cuatro formas de ver el entorno: visión estándar, visión térmica (que resalta a los Marines), visión electromagnética (que resalta a los Aliens) y "Pred-Tech" (para resaltar a sus compañeros Depredadores y su tecnología). Sus armas son las más precisas, letales y a distancia del juego, y son ideales para juegos basados en el sigilo. Los depredadores también tienen la capacidad de acercar y alejar su vista cuando buscan a alguien, lo que les permite disparar desde lejos. Su capacidad de camuflaje también los hace casi invisibles para los marines enemigos.
Hay varios modos multijugador. Para un juego difícil, puedes enfrentar a todos los jugadores contra la horda de criaturas informáticas (que incluyen alienígenas robóticos experimentales y resistentes híbridos Predalien). Alternativamente, los jugadores pueden elegir su especie favorita y enfrentarse en un combate a muerte estilo arena.
Aliens Versus Predator: Gold Edition es una recopilación con el siguiente contenido:
- Extraterrestres versus depredadores - Aliens Versus Predator: Paquete de expansión Millennium - Una guía de estrategia. Parts of the game were also reworked for this edition.
Game.Title: Aliens versus Predator: Gold Edition

Game.Notes: La historia de Chaos Legion es una ópera gótica que comienza en noviembre del año 791 d.C. (Anno Satanis): El protagonista, Sieg Wahrheit, es un Caballero de los Glifos Oscuros que, bajo el mando de la Orden de Santa Overia, emprende una misión para encontrar a su antiguo amigo, Víctor Delacroix, que ha robado el libro prohibido Apócrifo de Yzarc. , y para evitar que libere al espíritu maligno Azrail, que destruiría los tres planos de existencia: el Mundo Inferior, el Mundo Medio y el Mundo Celestial.
Game.Title: Chaos Legion

Game.Notes:
How Will You Survive?
The dead have risen and civilization has fallen. Not even the military could stop the zombies, and now it's up to you to gather survivors and build a community in a post-apocalyptic world – a world where every decision matters, and where you define what it means to survive.
State of Decay 2 is the ultimate zombie survival game in an open world where you and up to three friends build a community of survivors. It’s up to you to establish a base, develop your characters’ abilities, and manage resources to survive as a group in a world where choices matter and every decision has lasting consequences.
Every player’s experience is unique - as you play, the open world responds to your decisions, developing in real time and dynamically offering new opportunities for you to demonstrate your own personal survival priorities. These decisions also result in real consequences that affect your community. Send your best scavenger across the map to gather medicine for a sick friend... but know that they might not make it home. Help your neighbors, and you might make new allies... or you could decide that you need their food supply more than they do. In the end, how you survive might surprise you.
Game.Title: State of Decay 2

Game.Notes: Juego de acción y supervivencia en primera persona ambientado en un mundo abierto postapocalíptico invadido por zombis hambrientos de carne. Recorre una ciudad devastada por una misteriosa epidemia de virus. Busca suministros, fabrica armas y enfréntate a hordas de infectados.
Game.Title: Dying Light

Game.Notes:
Este juego es una mezcla entre dos juegos clásicos: Rogue, el juego de rol de exploración de mazmorras de solo texto que ha generado todo un género de juegos, y DOOM, uno de los juegos revolucionarios en el género de disparos en primera persona.
La historia es la misma que en Doom: eres un soldado que realiza sus monótonos deberes en una base espacial en Phobos, cuando de repente tu base es atacada. La única salida es a través de. Equipado únicamente con una pistola, comienzas a abrirte camino a través de los laberintos.
Las primeras versiones eran sólo de texto: en lugar del entorno 3D de DOOM, el mundo del juego se representa como una cuadrícula 2D de gráficos ASCII (los efectos de sonido se tomaron prestados del juego original). Una actualización posterior agregó un modo de gráficos opcional, usando ilustraciones basadas en mosaicos y una banda sonora de melodías remezcladas de DOOM más material original.
Aparte del estilo, este juego es un rastreador de mazmorras parecido a un Pícaro. El juego se basa en turnos y cada acción requiere una cierta cantidad de tiempo. Como en un juego de rol, el personaje tiene diferentes estadísticas que aumentan con su experiencia: puede recargar más rápido, hacer más daño, disparar con mayor precisión, etc. Durante el juego, encontrarás diferentes armas y potenciadores, todos bien. conocido por condenar a los jugadores (potenciadores de esfera azul, armadura verde, etc.).
El juego es gratuito y fue escrito en FreePascal, utilizando la biblioteca Valkyrie por el mismo desarrollador.
Game.Title: DOOM, the Roguelike

Game.Notes:
Es el año 1765. Mientras se siembran las semillas de la Revolución Americana en Boston y Nueva York, las fuerzas españolas en el sur conspiran para tomar el control de Luisiana para los Templarios, amenazando con cambiar para siempre el equilibrio de poder en el Nuevo Mundo. Mientras los Templarios se apoderan en secreto del comercio de esclavos en Nueva Orleans, Aveline de Grandpré, una asesina de ascendencia mixta francesa y africana, está lista para defender a su pueblo. Pronto se encuentra en un viaje inolvidable que la llevará desde las concurridas calles de Nueva Orleans hasta pantanos plagados de vudú y antiguas ruinas mayas. Ya sea eliminando a sus enemigos con nuevas habilidades de asesinato o atrayéndolos a trampas astutas, Aveline infunde un miedo mortal en los corazones de aquellos que se oponen a la libertad.
Aprovechando al máximo su nuevo hardware, Liberation HD presenta una revisión gráfica completa, música y efectos de sonido remasterizados, una experiencia de juego renovada y nuevas misiones que profundizan más.
----
El modo multijugador solo estaba disponible en la versión Sony Vita.
Game.Title: Assassin's Creed: Liberation HD

Game.Notes: Batman: Arkham Origins Blackgate - Deluxe Edition amplifica el juego 2.5-D desarrollado por Armature Studio con nuevos mapas, encuentros con enemigos, niveles de dificultad y batitrajes, todo con imágenes mejoradas. Un juego complementario de Batman: Arkham Origins, los jugadores pueden continuar la historia de la versión de consola y descubrir más detalles de la Oscuridad...
Game.Title: Batman: Arkham Origins: Blackgate Deluxe Edition

Game.Notes: Play the most polished and complete version of the most awarded game of 2015 - The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt – Game of the Year Edition. Now available with all expansions and additional content. Become a professional monster slayer and embark on an adventure of epic proportions! Upon its release, The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt became an instant classic, claiming over 250 Game of the Year awards. Now you can enjoy this huge, over 100-hour long, open-world adventure along with both its story-driven expansions worth an extra 50 hours of gameplay. This edition includes all additional content - new weapons, armor, companion outfits, new game mode and side quests. Features: Play as a Highly Trained Monster Slayer for Hire Trained from early childhood and mutated to have superhuman skills, strength, and reflexes, witchers are a socially ostracized counterbalance to the monster-infested world in which they live. - Gruesomely destroy foes as a professional monster hunter armed with a range of upgradeable weapons, mutating potions, and combat magic. - Hunt down a wide variety of exotic monsters, from savage beasts prowling mountain passes to cunning supernatural predators lurking in the shadowy back alleys of densely populated cities. - Invest your rewards to upgrade your weaponry and buy custom armor, or spend them on horse races, card games, fist fighting and other pleasures life brings. Track Down the Child of Prophecy in a Morally Ambiguous Fantasy Open World - Built for endless adventure, the massive open world of The Witcher sets new standards in terms of size, depth and complexity. - Traverse a fantastical open world: explore forgotten ruins, caves and shipwrecks, trade with merchants and dwarven smiths in cities, and hunt across open plains, amidst mountains and at sea. - In a time of war, track down the child of prophecy, a living weapon of great power whose coming was foretold in ancient elven legends. Make choices that go beyond good and evil and face their far-reaching consequences. Game of the Year Edition The Witcher 3: Wild Hunt Game of the Year Edition brings together the base game and all the additional content released to date. - Includes the Hearts of Stone and Blood & Wine expansions, which offer a massive 50 hours of additional storytelling as well as new features and new areas that expand the explorable world by over a third! - Affords access to all additional content released so far, including weapons, armor, side quests, game modes and new GWENT cards! - Features all technical and visual updates as well as a new user interface completely redesigned on the basis of feedback from members of the Witcher Community.
Game.Title: The Witcher III: Wild Hunt: Game of the Year Edition

Game.Notes:
Injustice 2 is a fighting video game developed by NetherRealm Studios and published by Warner Bros. Interactive Entertainment. It is the sequel to 2013's Injustice: Gods Among Us. The game was initially released in May 2017 for the PlayStation 4 and Xbox One; a Microsoft Windows version was released later in November 2017. An expanded version of the game, titled Injustice 2: Legendary Edition, was released in March 2018 for the PlayStation 4, Xbox One, and Microsoft Windows. Similar to the previous installment, a companion mobile app was released for Android and iOS devices. A prequel comic book series of the same name, written by Tom Taylor, was also released beginning in April 2017.
The core gameplay remains similar to its predecessor, albeit with minor adjustments to returning game mechanics. Injustice 2 introduces a new feature called the Gear System, a loot-dropping system that rewards players with costume pieces and equipment that can be used to customize characters' appearances and modify their abilities and stats. According to developers, the idea for implementing a role playing game (RPG)-style progression system into a fighting game had existed since before the fall of Midway Games, the original publisher for the Mortal Kombat series. Director Ed Boon also sought to incorporate gameplay mechanics used by multiplayer shooter games, such as personalization, character creation, loot, and leveling up, into the fighting game genre, which led to the development of the Gear System.
Injustice 2's storyline centers around Batman and his insurgency's attempt to restore society after the fall of Superman's regime; however, the arrivals of the newly formed supervillain group "The Society" and the alien Brainiac forces Batman to consider freeing the imprisoned Superman to help combat the threats. The game received positive reviews from critics, who praised its story, presentation, improved gameplay mechanics, abundance of in-game content, and character customization options, while criticizing its random loot and microtransaction systems.
Game.Title: Injustice 2: Legendary Edition

Game.Notes: Hustle by day and risk it all at night in Need for Speed™ Heat Deluxe Edition, a white-knuckle street racer, where the lines of the law fade as the sun starts to set.
Game.Title: Need for Speed Heat

Game.Notes: The game features the same premise as the original game, and involves controlling an army of worms and using a collection of eclectic weaponry such as bazookas, dynamite, grenades, cluster bombs, homing missiles, banana bombs and the infamous holy hand grenade. These are among the basic weapons used to eliminate the opposing team(s) of worms. It features a completely new graphics system, going for a cartoon style, which has remained for the rest of the series.
Game.Title: Worms 2

Game.Notes:
¿Y si Hitler nunca existiera? Einstein reflexionó sobre la cuestión y creó una máquina del tiempo para eliminar a Hitler cuando era joven, evitando así la Segunda Guerra Mundial tal como la recuerda la historia. Sin embargo, Einstein detuvo un mal sólo para crear otro, porque la Unión Soviética de Stalin ahora está preparada para conquistar Europa... ¡y los aliados deben detenerlos!
Command & Conquer: Red Alert puede considerarse una precuela de Command & Conquer. Al igual que su predecesor, es una estrategia en tiempo real con una perspectiva isométrica semi-arriba hacia abajo que utiliza un motor de gráficos de sprites 2D. El jugador toma el control de los aliados o de los soviéticos, mientras lucha por el destino del planeta. Las características del juego son similares a las del juego anterior, incluida la construcción de una base con algunas defensas, la concentración de unidades, la recolección de recursos, etc. El juego tiene una variedad de entornos en sus misiones, añadiendo algunas misiones interiores que utilizan sólo unidades de infantería.
Game.Title: Command & Conquer: Red Alert

Game.Notes: El nuevo thriller de acción del galardonado equipo de Infinity Ward, los creadores de la serie Call of Duty®, ofrece la experiencia de acción cinematográfica más intensa jamás vista. Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare arma a los jugadores con un arsenal de potencia de fuego avanzada y poderosa de hoy en día y los transporta a los puntos más traicioneros...
Game.Title: Call of Duty 4: Modern Warfare

Game.Notes: Mordheim: City of the Damned is the first video game adaptation of Games Workshop's cult classic tabletop game Mordheim. Set in the Warhammer World's decimated Empire city, Mordheim: City of the Damned is a turn-based tactical game where you lead warbands into bloody and lethal skirmishes.
Game.Title: Mordheim: City of the Damned

Game.Notes:
The Ork forces were ultimately defeated in the 2nd War for Armageddon, but amongst the billions of dead Orks one body was not to be found, that of Ghazghkull Mag Uruk Thraka.
Few in the Imperium heeded the warnings of Commissar Yarrick that he must be hunted down, foolishly believing that Thraka was just another Xeno who would surely be relegated to history. For Thraka though, the whole invasion of Armageddon was merely a way to test the waters – an experiment to learn how the Imperium would react against a massive invasion.
Now he is regrouping and building a new WAAAGH! on the isolated world of Golgotha. However, the venerable Yarrick has tracked him down and plans to launch a surprise strike on the world with the express aim of destroying Thraka at any cost!
Golgotha is an expansion of Warhammer 40,000: Armageddon, set 50 years after the end of the Second War for Armageddon, it is the last great battle of the cycle.
Join the Imperial forces under Yarrick’s command as they secure a footing on the Ork infested world before striking forth at Thraka’s army.
Although Yarrick has brought elements of the Steel Legion in the form of the 117th Armageddon Mechanised Infantry, the player’s core force is focused on the unwavering regiments of the 66th Mordian Infantry.
The Mordian Iron Guard are the bulk of the new units in this expansion, but the player will also eventually gain command of Yarrick himself atop the pulpit of his personal Baneblade tank, the Fortress of Arrogance.
Game.Title: Warhammer 40,000: Armageddon Golgotha

Game.Notes: El dinero habla. El silencio paga. Prepárese para matar. Cuando los asesinos de la agencia contratada del Agente 47, la ICA, son eliminados en una serie de golpes, parece que una agencia más grande y poderosa ha entrado en escena. Sintiendo que puede ser un objetivo, 47 viaja a Estados Unidos y se prepara para matar.
Game.Title: Hitman: Blood Money

Game.Notes:
Fortnite es un videojuego en línea desarrollado por Epic Games y lanzado en 2017. Está disponible en tres versiones distintas de modos de juego que, por lo demás, comparten la misma jugabilidad general y el mismo motor de juego: Fortnite: Save the World, un juego cooperativo de disparos y supervivencia para hasta cuatro jugadores para luchar contra criaturas parecidas a zombis y defender objetos con fortificaciones que pueden construir; Fortnite Battle Royale, un juego de batalla real gratuito en el que hasta 100 jugadores luchan por ser la última persona en pie; y Fortnite Creative, en el que los jugadores tienen total libertad para crear mundos y campos de batalla. Save the World y Battle Royale se lanzaron en 2017 como títulos de acceso anticipado, mientras que Creative se lanzó el 6 de diciembre de 2018. [ . . . ]
Fortnite Battle Royale es un juego de jugador contra jugador para hasta 100 jugadores, que permite jugar solo, en dúo o en un escuadrón (generalmente compuesto por tres o cuatro jugadores). Los jugadores desarmados se lanzan desde el aire desde un "Autobús de batalla" que cruza el mapa del juego. Cuando aterrizan, deben buscar armas, objetos, recursos e incluso vehículos mientras intentan mantenerse con vida y atacar y eliminar a otros jugadores. En el transcurso de una ronda, el área segura del mapa se reduce de tamaño debido a una tormenta tóxica entrante; los jugadores fuera de ese umbral sufren daños y pueden ser eliminados si no logran evacuar rápidamente. Esto obliga a los jugadores restantes a espacios más reducidos y fomenta los encuentros entre jugadores. El último jugador, dúo o equipo que quede será el ganador.
Fortnite: Save the World es un juego cooperativo de jugador contra entorno, en el que cuatro jugadores colaboran para lograr un objetivo común en varias misiones. El juego se desarrolla después de que aparece una tormenta fortuita en la Tierra, lo que provoca que el 98% de la población desaparezca y los supervivientes sean atacados por "cáscaras" parecidas a zombis. Los jugadores asumen el papel de comandantes de los refugios de la base, recolectando recursos, salvando a los sobrevivientes y defendiendo el equipo que ayuda a recopilar datos sobre la tormenta o a hacer retroceder la tormenta. De las misiones, los jugadores reciben una serie de elementos del juego, que incluyen personajes héroes, esquemas de armas y trampas, y supervivientes, todos los cuales pueden subir de nivel a través de la experiencia adquirida para mejorar sus atributos.
Fortnite Creative es un modo de juego sandbox, similar a Minecraft en el que los jugadores tienen total libertad para generar todo lo que hay dentro del juego en una isla, y pueden crear juegos como arenas de batalla, campos de carreras, desafíos de plataformas y más.
Game.Title: Fortnite

Game.Notes:
The Forest es un juego de terror y supervivencia de mundo abierto actualmente en desarrollo para PC.
Construye, explora y sobrevive en este aterrador simulador de terror y supervivencia en primera persona.
El mundo
Ingrese a un bosque vivo y respirable con patrones climáticos cambiantes, plantas que crecen y mueren. Mareas que entran y salen con el ciclo día/noche. Bajo tierra, explore una vasta red de cuevas y lagos subterráneos.
Libertad total del jugador
Tala árboles para construir un campamento o enciende un fuego para mantenerte caliente. Busque comida para evitar morir de hambre. Encuentra y planta semillas para cultivar alimentos.
Construye un pequeño refugio o una gran fortaleza junto al mar. Decora tu hogar con artículos encontrados. Coloca trampas y defensas para mantener un perímetro seguro.
Como se Juega
Explora y construye durante el día. Defiende tu base por la noche. Fabrica armas y herramientas. Refuérzate durante la noche o lleva la lucha directamente al enemigo.
Luchar o esconderse
Usa el sigilo para evadir a los enemigos o enfréntate a ellos directamente con armas toscas construidas con palos y piedras.
Un nuevo tipo de mundo abierto, experiencia de terror y supervivencia. Defend yourself against a clan of genetic mutant enemies that have beliefs, families and morals and that appear almost human.
Game.Title: The Forest
Game.Genre: Action; Adventure; Construction and Management Simulation; Horror; Stealth

Game.Notes: XCOM: Enemy Within is the expansion to the 2012 Game of the Year award-winning strategy game XCOM: Enemy Unknown. Enemy Within adds an incredible array of new abilities, upgrades and weapons to combat new enemy and alien threats. This expansion also introduces new maps and missions, new tactical and strategic gameplay, and new multiplayer content providing a fresh new gameplay experience.
Game.Title: XCOM: Enemy Within

Game.Notes: Estrategia. Velocidad. Historia. Estos son los pilares fundamentales de Battlefield™ Hardline, una experiencia de policías contra criminales como ninguna otra.
Game.Title: Battlefield Hardline
Game.Genre: Action; Flight Simulator; Shooter; Vehicle Simulation

Game.Notes:
Alice Drake es una psicóloga, que tiene la capacidad de adentrarse en los sueños de sus pacientes y tratar las enfermedades mentales no sólo con palabras, sino con fuego y plomo, eliminando la causa misma de sus pesadillas y fobias. Y si bien cada caso es único y ningún miedo es igual, Alice no puede evitar notar que los horrores que encuentra tienen algo en común.
Dreamkiller, procedente de los desarrolladores del mod convertido en expansión Painkiller: Overdose, sigue la fórmula básica de FPS refinada por Serious Sam y el Painkiller original: dispara a todo lo que se mueva e intenta no morir tú mismo. La acción se extiende a lo largo de una docena de niveles lineales, cada uno con su propio escenario retorcido y una galería de tiro de monstruos, que representan las mentes dementes de los pacientes de Alice.
Game.Title: DreamKiller

Game.Notes: Cyberpunk 2077 es un juego de rol de acción y aventuras de mundo abierto ambientado en el oscuro futuro de Night City, una peligrosa megalópolis obsesionada con el poder, el glamour y las incesantes modificaciones corporales.
Game.Title: Cyberpunk 2077

Game.Notes: Eres Isaac Clarke, ingeniero de la nave espacial USG Ishimura. No eres un guerrero. No eres un soldado. Sin embargo, eres la última línea de defensa para el resto de la tripulación viva.
Game.Title: Dead Space (2008)

Game.Notes:
MechWarrior 3: Pirate's Moon is the only expansion pack for MechWarrior 3, with an all new storyline and 20 new missions, plus six new mechs, brand new terrains, and a number of weapons. The player can select either Campaign Missions or Pirate Missions which contain respective stories. Campaign
The Lance Leader from MechWarrior 3 is now given an official name known as 'Lieutenant Connor Sinclair' and returns as main protagonist of the campaign missions. Sinclair is assigned to protect the Federated Suns' control over the planet Vale and its resources against New Belt Pirates led by Susie Ryan. During the confrontation, Sinclair and his lancemates encounter overwhelming pirate forces unexpectedly and explore for the further plot to be unveiled. Pirate Missions The player controls 'Scourge', the New Belt Pirate working for Susie Ryan as the forces attempt to attack the Federated Suns' defense and claim control over the resources on Vale.
Game.Title: MechWarrior 3: Pirate's Moon

Game.Notes: This sequel to Warhammer: Shadow Of The Horned Rat is an overhead role playing game in which you play Morgan Bernhardt. The game consists of a series of battles where you view the battle from overhead via a rotatable view. You go through the game managing your army, deciding whether to fight in optional battles, and advancing through a deep and engrossing storyline via a series of conversations played out by talking portraits.
Game.Title: Warhammer: Dark Omen

Game.Notes: Army Men II, la secuela del éxito de ventas Army Men, lleva la guerra de soldados de juguete de plástico a la cocina, el dormitorio, el patio delantero y el garaje. Una vez más, Sarge liderará a sus heroicas fuerzas verdes hacia un caos de combate que derretirá cabezas y explotará partes de cuerpos de plástico; ¡Solo que esta vez la batalla es por el control del fregadero de la cocina!
Game.Title: Army Men II

Game.Notes: Explore a dark world brimming with hidden mysteries, master a diverse combat system, and inhabit the dual forces of two sisters in a coming-of-age dark fantasy story with fast-paced action, vicious enemies, and spectacular boss fights.
Game.Title: Soulstice

Game.Notes: Sonic & the gang, are back in the latest game, SONIC HEROES. Coming out on the Gamecube & for the first time on Playstation 2, Xbox And PC! Sonic Heroes has a twist to the gameplay, you choose a team of 3 characters. With different strengths. There are 4 teams: TEAM SONIC ~ Sonic, Tails & Knuckles TEAM DARK ~ Shadow, Rouge & E-123 Omega TEAM CHAOTIX ~ Espio, Vector, & Charmy Bee TEAM ROSE ~ Amy, Big, & Cream with her Chao sidekick Cheese. There are 4 modes, Story mode, Challenge mode, the Tutorial modes & the new & improved battle mode for multiplayer fun, and there are plenty of secrets to unlock.
Game.Title: Sonic Heroes

Game.Notes:
Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter (GRAW) is a tactical shooter video game released for Xbox 360, Xbox, PlayStation 2 and Microsoft Windows. As in previous Ghost Recon games, players command their team of Ghosts while neutralizing hostile forces and completing various mission objectives. These objectives can range from escorting friendly units across the map to rescuing hostages or taking out enemy artillery.
Being a tactical shooter, Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter places emphasis on using cover effectively in order to stay alive, together with sound strategic co-ordination to successfully complete mission objectives. A new feature is the Integrated Warfighter System, a system based upon the Future Force Warrior program.
Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon Advanced Warfighter 2, the game's direct sequel, was released a year later, in 2007.
Game.Title: Tom Clancy's Ghost Recon: Advanced Warfighter

Game.Notes:
